title: Phlegmariurus hohenackeri
taxonomy: Phlegmariurus hohenackeri is classified as a species within the genus Phlegmariurus, which belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This family is part of the order Lycopodiales, and the class Lycopodiopsida. The phylum is Lycopodiophyta, and the kingdom is Plantae. Phlegmariurus hohenackeri is a type of club moss, a group of ancient vascular plants. The classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
